'''ây-z-f''' ('''yazafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lampwork|lampwork]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lampwork|lampwork]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-z-f
|-
! Lemma
| yazafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yazafithi|yazafithi]] || [[word:yazafiji|yazafiji]] || [[word:yazafishi|yazafishi]] || [[word:yazafi|yazafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazafuthuth|yazafuthuth]] || [[word:yazafujuj|yazafujuj]] || [[word:yazafushush|yazafushush]] || [[word:yazaf|yazaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazafuthu|yazafuthu]] || [[word:yazafuju|yazafuju]] || [[word:yazafushu|yazafushu]] || [[word:yazafu|yazafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazafufuth|yazafufuth]] || [[word:yazafufuj|yazafufuj]] || [[word:yazafufush|yazafufush]] || [[word:yazafuf|yazafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yazafethe|yazafethe]] || [[word:yazafeje|yazafeje]] || [[word:yazafeshe|yazafeshe]] || [[word:yazafe|yazafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazafothoth|yazafothoth]] || [[word:yazafojoj|yazafojoj]] || [[word:yazafoshosh|yazafoshosh]] || [[word:yazaf|yazaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazafotho|yazafotho]] || [[word:yazafojo|yazafojo]] || [[word:yazafosho|yazafosho]] || [[word:yazafo|yazafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazafofoth|yazafofoth]] || [[word:yazafofoj|yazafofoj]] || [[word:yazafofosh|yazafofosh]] || [[word:yazafof|yazafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yazafĂŠthĂŠ|yazafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yazafĂŠjĂŠ|yazafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yazafĂŠshĂŠ|yazafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yazafĂŠ|yazafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazafathath|yazafathath]] || [[word:yazafajaj|yazafajaj]] || [[word:yazafashash|yazafashash]] || [[word:yazaf|yazaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazafatha|yazafatha]] || [[word:yazafaja|yazafaja]] || [[word:yazafasha|yazafasha]] || [[word:yazafa|yazafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazafafath|yazafafath]] || [[word:yazafafaj|yazafafaj]] || [[word:yazafafash|yazafafash]] || [[word:yazafaf|yazafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yazafasha|yazafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyazafasha|goyazafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyazafasha|gokiyazafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yazafnĂŒsha|yazafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyazafnknĂŒsha|goyazafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyazafnĂŒsha|gokiyazafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yazafshĂ«sha|yazafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyazafnkshĂ«sha|goyazafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyazafshĂ«sha|gokiyazafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yazafrosha|yazafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyazafnkrosha|goyazafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyazafrosha|gokiyazafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yazafmusha|yazafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazafnkmusha|goyazafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazafmusha|gokiyazafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yazafsherasha|yazafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyazafnksherasha|goyazafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyazafsherasha|gokiyazafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yazafngasha|yazafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyazafnkngasha|goyazafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyazafngasha|gokiyazafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yazafyasha|yazafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyazafnkyasha|goyazafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyazafyasha|gokiyazafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yazafyamasha|yazafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyazafnkyamasha|goyazafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyazafyamasha|gokiyazafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yazafnĂŒshĂ«sha|yazafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyazafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyazafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyazafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyazafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yazafnĂŒrosha|yazafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyazafnknĂŒrosha|goyazafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyazafnĂŒrosha|gokiyazafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazafnĂŒmusha|yazafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazafnknĂŒmusha|goyazafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazafnĂŒmusha|gokiyazafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yazafshĂ«nĂŒsha|yazafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyazafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyazafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyazafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyazafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yazafshĂ«rosha|yazafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyazafnkshĂ«rosha|goyazafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyazafshĂ«rosha|gokiyazafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazafshĂ«musha|yazafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazafnkshĂ«musha|goyazafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazafshĂ«musha|gokiyazafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yazafronĂŒsha|yazafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyazafnkronĂŒsha|goyazafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyazafronĂŒsha|gokiyazafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yazafroshĂ«sha|yazafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyazafnkroshĂ«sha|goyazafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyazafroshĂ«sha|gokiyazafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yazafromusha|yazafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyazafnkromusha|goyazafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyazafromusha|gokiyazafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yazafmunĂŒsha|yazafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyazafnkmunĂŒsha|goyazafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyazafmunĂŒsha|gokiyazafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yazafmushĂ«sha|yazafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyazafnkmushĂ«sha|goyazafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyazafmushĂ«sha|gokiyazafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yazafmurosha|yazafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyazafnkmurosha|goyazafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyazafmurosha|gokiyazafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yazaf|yazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠzĂŠf|yĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyazaf|hoyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠzĂŠf|hoyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyazaf|hohoyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠzĂŠf|hohoyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyazaf|nĂŒyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠzĂŠf|nĂŒyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyazaf|nĂŒnĂŒyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠzĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyazaf|nĂŻyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠzĂŠf|nĂŻyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyazaf|nĂŻnĂŻyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠzĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyazaf|luyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠzĂŠf|luyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyazaf|luluyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠzĂŠf|luluyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyazaf|liyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠzĂŠf|liyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyazaf|liliyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠzĂŠf|liliyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyazaf|koyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠzĂŠf|koyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyazaf|kokoyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠzĂŠf|kokoyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyazaf|keyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠzĂŠf|keyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyazaf|kekeyazaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠzĂŠf|kekeyĂŠzĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
